review_rules: the pass sample must repeat one exact identity-locked non-food product source
the paired block must stay in the same category while breaking exact product identity
research labels do not authorize integration, rendering, upload, comment, or visibility changes

vehicle-v112-single-source-repeat-pass.basis: five scenes repeat the exact V112 rear-seat organizer hero whose preview evidence records a locked current product reference

vehicle-controlled-four-source-identity-.basis: same-category control mixes the V112 rear-seat organizer with three V046 center-console organizer sources, breaking exact product identity and the one-to-three-source profile
